ddls:
CREATE TABLE "departments" (
  "dept_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each department */,
  "dept_name" TEXT /* Full name of the department */,
  "dept_code" TEXT /* Short code for the department (e.g., BIOE) */,
  "dept_head_id" INTEGER /* ID of the department head */,
  "dept_description" TEXT /* Description of the department */,
  "dept_contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email of the department */,
  "dept_website" TEXT /* Website of the department */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dept_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "courses" (
  "course_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each course */,
  "dept_id" INTEGER /* ID of the department offering the course */,
  "course_number" INTEGER /* Course number */,
  "course_title" TEXT /* Title of the course */,
  "credit_hours" INTEGER /* Number of credit hours for the course */,
  "course_description" TEXT /* Description of the course */,
  "prerequisites" TEXT /* Prerequisites for the course */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("course_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_courses_dept_id FOREIGN KEY ("dept_id") REFERENCES departments ("dept_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sections" (
  "section_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each section */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* ID of the course the section belongs to */,
  "section_number" TEXT /* Section number (e.g., 001, 002) */,
  "semester" TEXT /* Semester (e.g., Fall, Spring) */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the section is offered */,
  "instructor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the instructor teaching the section */,
  "room_number" TEXT /* Room number where the section is held */,
  "meeting_days" TEXT /* Days of the week the section meets */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the section */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the section */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("section_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sections_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sections_instructor_id FOREIGN KEY ("instructor_id") REFERENCES instructors ("instructor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "instructors" (
  "instructor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each instructor */,
  "instructor_name" TEXT /* Full name of the instructor */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the instructor */,
  "dept_id" INTEGER /* ID of the department the instructor belongs to */,
  "instructor_title" TEXT /* Title of the instructor (e.g., Professor, Lecturer) */,
  "instructor_office_hours" TEXT /* Office hours of the instructor */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("instructor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "students" (
  "student_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each student */,
  "student_name" TEXT /* Full name of the student */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the student */,
  "major_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student's major */,
  "student_status" TEXT /* Status of the student (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "student_gpa" TEXT /* GPA of the student */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("student_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_students_major_id FOREIGN KEY ("major_id") REFERENCES majors ("major_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "enrollments" (
  "enrollment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each enrollment */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student */,
  "section_id" INTEGER /* ID of the section the student is enrolled in */,
  "enrollment_date" TEXT /* Date the student enrolled in the section */,
  "grade" TEXT /* Grade the student received in the section */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("enrollment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_enrollments_section_id FOREIGN KEY ("section_id") REFERENCES sections ("section_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_enrollments_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "grades" (
  "grade_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each grade entry */,
  "enrollment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the enrollment */,
  "grade_a" INTEGER /* Number of students who received an A */,
  "grade_b" INTEGER /* Number of students who received a B */,
  "grade_c" INTEGER /* Number of students who received a C */,
  "grade_d" INTEGER /* Number of students who received a D */,
  "grade_f" INTEGER /* Number of students who received an F */,
  "grade_i" INTEGER /* Number of students who received an I */,
  "grade_nr" INTEGER /* Number of students who received an NR */,
  "grade_s" INTEGER /* Number of students who received an S */,
  "grade_u" INTEGER /* Number of students who received a U */,
  "grade_w" INTEGER /* Number of students who received a W */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("grade_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_grades_enrollment_id FOREIGN KEY ("enrollment_id") REFERENCES enrollments ("enrollment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "majors" (
  "major_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each major */,
  "major_name" TEXT /* Name of the major */,
  "dept_id" INTEGER /* ID of the department offering the major */,
  "major_description" TEXT /* Description of the major */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("major_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_majors_dept_id FOREIGN KEY ("dept_id") REFERENCES departments ("dept_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "assignments" (
  "assignment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each assignment */,
  "section_id" INTEGER /* ID of the section the assignment belongs to */,
  "assignment_name" TEXT /* Name of the assignment */,
  "due_date" TEXT /* Due date of the assignment */,
  "points_possible" INTEGER /* Total points possible for the assignment */,
  "assignment_type" TEXT /* Type of assignment (e.g., homework, project, exam) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("assignment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_assignments_section_id FOREIGN KEY ("section_id") REFERENCES sections ("section_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "submissions" (
  "submission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each submission */,
  "assignment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the assignment the submission is for */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student who submitted the assignment */,
  "submission_date" TEXT /* Date the assignment was submitted */,
  "points_earned" INTEGER /* Points earned by the student for the assignment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("submission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_submissions_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_submissions_assignment_id FOREIGN KEY ("assignment_id") REFERENCES assignments ("assignment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role (e.g., read, write, admin) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_accounts" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Username for the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user's role */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user account */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_accounts_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "gradebook" (
  "gradebook_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each gradebook entry */,
  "assignment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the assignment */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student */,
  "grade" TEXT /* Grade the student received in the assignment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("gradebook_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_gradebook_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_gradebook_assignment_id FOREIGN KEY ("assignment_id") REFERENCES assignments ("assignment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "attendance" (
  "attendance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each attendance entry */,
  "section_id" INTEGER /* ID of the section */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the class */,
  "attended" INTEGER /* Whether the student attended the class */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("attendance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_attendance_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_attendance_section_id FOREIGN KEY ("section_id") REFERENCES sections ("section_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "faculty_evaluations" (
  "evaluation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each evaluation */,
  "section_id" INTEGER /* ID of the section */,
  "instructor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the instructor */,
  "evaluation_date" TEXT /* Date the evaluation was submitted */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the student (1-5) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("evaluation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_faculty_evaluations_instructor_id FOREIGN KEY ("instructor_id") REFERENCES instructors ("instructor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_faculty_evaluations_section_id FOREIGN KEY ("section_id") REFERENCES sections ("section_id")
)
